title: On the inhibition of RNA silencing movement by the tombusvirus P19 protein: reliance on sRNA binding and correlation with local silencing suppression
author: Aguilar, Emmanuel
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: Research letter, a response to Brioudes et al.(2022) ‘Suppression of both intra- and intercellular RNA silencing by the tombusviral P19 protein requires its small RNA binding property’, research letter published in New Phytologist.
steps_raw: Research letter, a response to Brioudes et al.(2022) ‘Suppression of both intra- and intercellular RNA silencing by the tombusviral P19 protein requires its small RNA binding property’, research letter published in New Phytologist.
